name: RAWx LJ — Drive to Journal Auto-Publish
description: Watches designated Google Drive category folders. When a new photo/video lands, tags it, appends a new entry to blog-data.json (via GitHub API commit), and logs it to Airtable for editorial review. Import this as a starting blueprint in Make.com — module IDs are illustrative; reconnect each module to your own Drive, GitHub, and Airtable accounts after import.

modules.label: Watch Category Folders
modules.notes: One watcher per category folder: /RAWx-LJ-Journal/factory, /materials, /biker, /bomber, /varsity, /trench-shearling, /qc-export, /team-bts. Trigger: file created.

modules.label: Derive Category + Naming
modules.notes: Category = parent folder name. New filename follows blog-[category]-[NN].jpg convention; NN = next sequence number for that category (lookup via Airtable count).

modules.label: Get Next Sequence Number
modules.notes: Query 'Journal Entries' table, filter by Category, count existing rows to compute next -01/-02/... suffix.

modules.label: Commit Media to Repo
modules.notes: Writes the binary into assets/blog/{{category}}/ using the derived filename. Requires a GitHub PAT with repo write scope, stored as a Make.com connection (never hard-code the token in the scenario).

modules.label: Append New Entry
modules.notes: Pushes { id, category, type, file, caption, linked_catalog, date } onto entries[]. Caption defaults to empty string, filled in later via Airtable editorial review (module 10).

modules.label: Log to Airtable for Editorial Review
modules.notes: Editorial fills in the real caption + verifies category/linked_catalog, then a lightweight follow-up scenario (not included here) patches blog-data.json again on Airtable row update.

error_handling.note: Add a Make.com error handler on modules 5, 6, 9 (GitHub API) to retry once on 409/conflict (concurrent commit) before alerting via email/Slack.
error_handling.recommended_channel: Slack DM or email to Jessika on any 2nd-retry failure
